checks.name: mount_/omega_pool
checks.detail: omega_pool must be a mounted filesystem.

checks.name: slice_heavy_memoryhigh
checks.detail: heavy-workload.slice MemoryHigh must stay at protected baseline.

checks.name: slice_heavy_memorymax
checks.detail: heavy-workload.slice MemoryMax must stay at protected baseline.

checks.name: slice_heavy_cpuquota
checks.detail: heavy-workload.slice CPU quota must remain uncapped for throughput.

checks.name: slice_user_memorymax_info
checks.detail: user-1000.slice MemoryMax is informational (OOM risk context).

checks.name: cache_free_space
checks.detail: framing_cache free space must exceed threshold.

checks.name: stage_process_cgroup
checks.detail: All running stage processes must be in heavy-workload.slice.

checks.name: prev_boot_oom_context
checks.detail: Previous boot includes kernel OOM signatures; verify launch path is guarded.
